2606.31026.title: OTCache: Optimal Transport for Geometry-Aware Caching in Diffusion Models
2606.31026.paper_summary: We propose OTCache, a training-free framework for accelerating diffusion sampling via caching schedule prediction. Existing graph-based caching methods reduce redundant computation by optimizing shortest-path objectives, but rely on an additive independence assumption, which often breaks down in the low NFE regime. To address this issue, OTCache models caching schedules across inference budgets as a smooth evolution in policy space, inspired by Optimal Transport (OT). The framework consists of three stages: (1) obtaining a high-fidelity \textbf{reference schedule} using a graph-based caching method under a conservative budget; (2) performing a lightweight anchor search under an extreme low-budget setting via Optuna optimization with an end-to-end perceptual objective; and (3) predicting schedules for target budgets via quantile interpolation between the reference and anchor policies using continuous warping representations. Experiments on FLUX.1 [dev], Qwen-Image, and HunyuanVideo show that OTCache achieves 4.5x, 4.7x, and 3.66x acceleration, respectively, while consistently improving generation fidelity over state-of-the-art caching baselines. This work provides a new perspective on accelerating diffusion models through Optimal-Transport-inspired schedule modeling. Code:https://github.com/UnicomAI/OTCache
2606.31026.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了OTCache，一個無需訓練的框架，用於通過緩存計劃預測來加速擴散取樣。現有的基於圖的緩存方法通過優化最短路徑目標來減少冗餘計算，但依賴於加性獨立假設，這在低NFE範疇內往往會失效。為了解決這個問題，OTCache將推理預算下的緩存計劃建模為政策空間中的平滑演變，靈感來自最優傳輸（Optimal Transport，OT）。該框架由三個階段組成：（1）在保守預算下使用基於圖的緩存方法獲取高保真度的\textbf{參考計劃}；（2）通過使用端到端的感知目標進行Optuna優化，在極低預算設置下執行輕量級的錨點搜索；以及（3）通過使用連續變形表示在參考和錨點政策之間進行分位數插值，預測目標預算的計劃。對FLUX.1 [dev]、Qwen-Image和HunyuanVideo的實驗表明，OTCache分別實現了4.5倍、4.7倍和3.66倍的加速，同時在生成保真度上持續改善了最先進的緩存基準。這項工作為通過受最優傳輸啟發的計劃建模來加速擴散模型提供了一種新視角。代碼：https://github.com/UnicomAI/OTCache
2606.31026.author: Huanlin Gao et.al.
2606.31026.authors: Huanlin Gao, Fang Zhao, Qiang Hui, Fuyuan Shi, Shaoan Zhao, Yantao Li, Chao Tan, Ting Lu, Yuren You, Kai Wang, Shiguo Lian
